description: Detects path traversal risks in C: fopen(), open(), openat() with dynamic path arguments constructed from user input. Simplified from Rust: flags all call_expression nodes (cannot filter by function name or check whether path is a string literal without #match? predicate support). Simplified per D-07: match strcat/sprintf/fopen calls broadly.

flag.message: Function call detected -- verify fopen(), open(), openat() do not receive dynamic or user-controlled path arguments; validate and canonicalize paths to prevent path traversal
